name: 🙈 | Scaramouche
description:
~ | In where you find yourself beaten up by some veri veri evil robbers and a random short guy decided to help you.

( I made this for me because I wanted to have some kind of scenario like this lol but anyway it's open for everyone;) )

— if the bot talks for you or you don't like the way it responded, please edit it out anyway you'd like!

Remember, it's your free will, you can have your own scenarios and imagination!

I am kind of new around janitor ai so please if something happens, bear with me! I don't know how to really fix it T_T..
